areas.name: Framework Architecture
areas.notes: Hybrid SDD plus project-memory model defined and integrated into repository structure.

tasks.title: Align project-memory with SDD lifecycle
tasks.notes: Integration rules documented across status, checkpoints, and forecasting.

tasks.title: Validate continuity into ship and archive workflows
tasks.notes: Documentation covers continuity, but downstream examples can still expand.

areas.name: Commands and Agents
areas.notes: New operational commands and agents now complement the SDD command set.

tasks.title: Create /start-project command
tasks.notes: Initializes manifest, roadmap, current state, and metrics.

tasks.title: Create /checkpoint and /status commands
tasks.notes: Supports session logging and recovery context.

tasks.title: Create /forecast-week command
tasks.notes: Generates forecast outputs and metrics update guidance.

tasks.title: Add operational agents for tracking, drift detection, and forecasting

areas.name: Operational Templates
areas.notes: Templates are practical and intended for immediate reuse in future initialized projects.

tasks.title: Create manifest and state templates
tasks.notes: Manifest, status, session, and checkpoint templates created.

tasks.title: Create forecast and executive reporting templates
tasks.notes: Forecast template and executive status reporting structure created.

areas.name: Documentation and Adoption
areas.notes: Primary docs updated; broader examples can still be expanded in future releases.

tasks.title: Update root README for hybrid workflow
tasks.notes: Main value proposition expanded beyond pure SDD.

tasks.title: Update command and agent catalog docs
tasks.notes: Indexes include new command and agent families.

tasks.title: Expand tutorials and deeper examples for project memory
tasks.notes: Could add detailed walkthroughs with realistic sample projects.
